MSysQueries.Expression: OEM = Forms!frmBuildOutRegister!cboOEM AND modelName Is Not Null AND Trim(modelName & '') <> ''
OEM is Not Null AND Trim(OEM & '') <> ''
OEM = Forms!frmBuildOutRegister!cboOEM AND modelName = Forms!frmBuildOutRegister!cboModel AND modelCode Is Not Null AND Trim(modelCode & '') <> ''
(((CR.RequestDate) Is Not Null) And ((CR.ResponseDate) Is Null) And ((UCase(Nz(CR.Unit,"")))<>"U7") And ((BusinessDueDate(CR.RequestDate,CR.Unit))<Date()))

CR.[Program] Is Not Null
AND Trim(CR.[Program]) <> ""
bomMat.ORGANIZATION_ID Not In (203,262) AND bomInv.DISABLE_DATE Is Null
